text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go to the shopping district to buy some things
on my day off, when...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So that's the Boutique Cherie's latest dress?

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper Lady
text_block_list.text:
Yes, our pride and joy! Isn't it nice? It's a
combination of python and leopard prints! It even
has the faces of a snake and a leopard on it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ummm... yeah, it's a bit flashy. I'll admit it's got a
certain mature charm to it, though.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper Lady
text_block_list.text:
Do you like it, Natie? I'll give you a discount! I'll
even throw in a tiger print pouch!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I'm ready for that combination yet... I
mean, no one but you can rock it.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper Lady
text_block_list.text:
Don't be like that, Natie! Anyone can make it
work—you just have to put it on! That's how
clothes work!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Now that's the kind of pitch I expect from
Boutique Cherie's level-sixty-six saleswoman,
Kimie!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper Lady
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, is that how old you think I am? Keep joking like that, and I'll force you to buy it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hehe, please, don't!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What are you doing here? Oh wait. It's the
shopping district, so shopping, duh.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper Lady
text_block_list.text:
That's right. You're the only young person who
comes by here just to chat.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? This shopping district is the
hottest spot right now.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Look at this amazing selection too, Trainer! This
place has the largest selection of animal prints in
the world!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Kimie! Can you rustle up something special
for my trainer?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And make it super intimidating! I don't want
anyone messing with my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper Lady
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Natie. Don't tease your trainer too
much.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper Lady
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you in the middle of shopping? Why don't
you go too, Natie?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nooo, I'm too tired. No way I could keep up with
a youngster.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper Lady
text_block_list.text:
You're too young for those kinds of complaints!
Now stop loitering and go enjoy your date!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay, oka—huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: W-wait, no! It's not a date, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Nice Nature shows me around the
shopping district, and I buy what I came for.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh, we sure walked a lot! My back is killing
me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nah, don't mention it. I didn't do anything
special.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All I did was chat with the shopping district folks.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But dang, they're clearly not busy enough, seeing
as they all had time to keep teasing me about
being on a date.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While her words have an edge, Nice Nature's
expression is kind when she talks about the
people in the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell that they all love her. And beyond that,
I can tell they are people she can rely on.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I-I do, but... why did you have to actually say it?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's kind of embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I guess so.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, sure. They're probably nosier than actual
parents.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But all the same... they cheer for me no matter
what.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Like, who would do that? Cheer for me?! It's funny, honestly.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: They care about me sooo much.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And I get reeeeally motivated when they cheer
me on.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Gyah, what am I saying?! How embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Three, two, one, and—gone! I just wiped your
memory.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All right, let's go home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature is embarrassed and hurries me back
to the academy.
